title: Japan's SBI Group to launch JPYSC stablecoin lending service this month
message_html: Japan's SBI Group to launch JPYSC stablecoin lending service this month ...
snippet: The SBI's service would offer users a 3% annual yield for deposited JPYSC stablecoins, according to Nikkei.

title: Bank of Thailand audits high-volume stablecoin trades to crack down on illicit finance
message_html: Bank of Thailand audits high-volume stablecoin trades to crack down on illicit finance ...
snippet: The central bank and the SEC have reportedly begun using data analytics tools to examine abnormal stablecoin trades, with a focus on USDT.

title: Bottomline CFO Suite unlocks stablecoins for corporate finance
message_html: Bottomline CFO Suite unlocks stablecoins for corporate finance ...
snippet: Bottomline, a global leader in business payments, today announced an expansion of its Bottomline CFO Suite, enabling finance teams to access and view stablecoin payments within existing payment and cash management workflows.
